name: Honey Granola Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice bananas into about 1-inch thick slices.
2. Roll the banana slices in honey.
3. Roll the coated banana slices in granola.
Fast, easy and delicious. You can freeze these for an even faster, easier breakfast...they're great frozen. I'm not a honey lover, so I just roll in granola, pressing it in gently, then freeze.
